nasb.text: O Jacob My servant, do not fear,” declares the Lord, “For I am with you. For I will make a full end of all the nations Where I have driven you, Yet I will not make a full end of you; But I will correct you properly And by no means leave you unpunished.”

esv.text: Fear not, O Jacob my servant, declares the Lord, for I am with you. I will make a full end of all the nations to which I have driven you, but of you I will not make a full end. I will discipline you in just measure, and I will by no means leave you unpunished.”

cnv.text: 我的僕人雅各啊！你不要懼怕。 因為我與你同在； 我要消滅我趕逐你去的列國。 卻必不消滅你。 我要按公正懲治你， 決不能免你受罰。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我的仆人雅各啊，不要害怕， 因为我与你同在。 我曾使你流亡到列国， 我必彻底毁灭列国， 但不会彻底毁灭你， 也不会饶过你， 我必公正地惩治你。 这是耶和华说的。”
